zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Foliot於1143年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾其皮-沃登時，他的父親Ralph Foliot20歲，母親Hawise Chesney20歲。他和Millicent Hastings至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1203年在英國諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Foliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Lombardy): variant of   Foglio  . This surname is very rare in Italy.

variants.name: Foglio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Dino, Flavio, Julieta, Sal, Salvatore.
Italian: probably from the Latin personal name Folius (which is embodied in the common placename Fogliano).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Foliot was born in 1143, in Chipping-Warden, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Ralph Foliot, was 20 and his mother, Hawise Chesney, was 20. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Millicent Hastings. He died in 1203, in Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 60.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Foliotが1143年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチップイング-ワーデンで生まれた時，父Ralph Foliotは20歳，母Hawise Chesneyは20歳であった。彼はMillicent Hastingsとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1203年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチップイング ワーデンで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Foliot(이)가 1143년 영국 노르섬프토실르 치핀그-워든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Foliot(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Chesney(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Millicent Hastings(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1203년 영국 노르섬프토실르 치핀그 워든에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Foliot родился в 1143 г. в местности чиппинг-варден, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Foliot было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Chesney, 20. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Millicent Hastings. Он умер в 1203 г. в местности чиппинг варден, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.
